title: What are the differences between English Platinum dub
display_title: What are the differences between English Platinum dub
wikitext: []: What are the differences between English Platinum dub?             Quote Post by V » Wed Aug 13, 2008 5:52 pm Ok, trying to work this out definitively here: we all know that the "Platinum Edition" English Dub release by ADV Films contains the four "Director's Cut" episodes, 21 through 24, with an entirely new dub for all four episodes as well as new scenes (22 minutes in all, divided between the four episodes...wait, 22 minutes, is that about right?) btw, what do you call the "original release" from ADV? The VHS version? (something of a misnomer as I do believe it was released on DVD for a while but was basically the same thing) at any rate, I have heard mention that *****even within episodes 1-20, there are slight differences between the original version and Platinum version. First off, *why* were these changes made? Things they knew they couldn't get away with the first time, or what? ****the biggest one I hear of is Shinji's "bullshit!" line in episode 5 : was this edited out of the original dub script, or added in because they thought they could "get away with more" in Platinum, or what? What's the story with this? I've heard people mention it but no clear explanation. But there are other things, case in point: http://www.animenewsnetwork.com/edit-list/2005-11-08/neon-genesis-evangelion-ep-2-and-3 Misato's "You don't think it's contamination, do you?" changed to "You don't think it's brain damage, do you?" to Ritsko while riding in the truck. I don't believe this is an edit but reflects the dialogue changes that were made between the regular and Platinum versions of Eva ("You don't think it's contamination, do you?" is the line from the Platinum edition).

Article: What are the differences between English Platinum dub
[]: What are the differences between English Platinum dub?             Quote Post by V » Wed Aug 13, 2008 5:52 pm Ok, trying to work this out definitively here: we all know that the "Platinum Edition" English Dub release by ADV Films contains the four "Director's Cut" episodes, 21 through 24, with an entirely new dub for all four episodes as well as new scenes (22 minutes in all, divided between the four episodes...wait, 22 minutes, is that about right?) btw, what do you call the "original release" from ADV? The VHS version? (something of a misnomer as I do believe it was released on DVD for a while but was basically the same thing) at any rate, I have heard mention that *****even within episodes 1-20, there are slight differences between the original version and Platinum version. First off, *why* were these changes made? Things they knew they couldn't get away with the first time, or what? ****the biggest one I hear of is Shinji's "bullshit!" line in episode 5 : was this edited out of the original dub script, or added in because they thought they could "get away with more" in Platinum, or what? What's the story with this? I've heard people mention it but no clear explanation. But there are other things, case in point: http://www.animenewsnetwork.com/edit-list/2005-11-08/neon-genesis-evangelion-ep-2-and-3 Misato's "You don't think it's contamination, do you?" changed to "You don't think it's brain damage, do you?" to Ritsko while riding in the truck. I don't believe this is an edit but reflects the dialogue changes that were made between the regular and Platinum versions of Eva ("You don't think it's contamination, do you?" is the line from the Platinum edition).
